info.title: Fourthwall API
info.description: Fourthwall is a creator commerce platform. This API provides both a Platform API for managing orders, products, memberships, webhooks, and other shop resources, and a Storefront API for building custom storefronts with cart, product, and collection access.

get.description: Get a webhook

put.description: Sets streaming status to started for specified services
Sets streaming status to ended for specified services

put.summary: Get or create a public token
put.description: Returns an existing public token for the shop, or creates a new one if none exists
Marks digital download as downloaded. If no downloads exist and defaultFileUrl is provided in the request body, creates a download with that URL and marks it as downloaded.
Creates a new giveaway or updates existing one

get.description:
Get the currently selected and all available regions for a customization.

            Returns both the selected regions and the full list of available regions
            from the product's generator, with a flag indicating which are selected.

put.description:
Set which regions are active on a customization. This replaces all currently
            set regions (PUT semantics — full replacement).

            Pass an empty regionIds list to clear all regions.
            Duplicate region IDs in the request are de-duplicated silently.

Place one or more images onto a specific region of a customization.
            Uses PUT semantics — replaces all existing images on the target region.

            Send an empty images list to clear the region.

            Each image requires a URI from the media upload flow and intrinsic dimensions.
            Optional positioning (offsetX, offsetY) and scale parameters control placement
            within the region. Images are centered by default.

            Multiple images are layered in array order (first = bottom, last = top).
            The placement is applied uniformly to all product sizes.
            The region is automatically added to usedRegions when images are placed,
            and removed when the region is cleared.

get.description: Get webhooks

post.description: Upload thank you media for a contribution (order, donation, membership, etc.)

get.description: Returns all promotions

post.summary: Exchange authorization code or refresh token for access token
post.description: OAuth 2.0 token endpoint. Supports 'authorization_code' grant type for exchanging authorization codes for tokens, and 'refresh_token' grant type for refreshing access tokens.
Creates a new package with specified number of giveaway links

post.summary: Create a fulfillment for an order
post.description: Creates a fulfillment with a shipment tracker for provided order items. When trackers change their state, order.status will change to IN_PRODUCTION, PARTIALLY_IN_PRODUCTION, PARTIALLY_SHIPPED, SHIPPED depending on the shipping tracker info. Order updated webhooks will be triggered.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of external orders with optional filters for status, source, and date range.

post.description: Create an externally-paid order for fulfillment. This creates an order where payment was processed on an external marketplace (e.g., Etsy, Amazon) and Fourthwall handles fulfillment. The creator will be charged for fulfillment costs.

Cancels an external order and its fulfillments. Payment is not processed since external orders are paid on the marketplace. Use forceCancel=true to bypass IN_PRODUCTION and ON_HOLD restrictions (cannot bypass PACKAGED or SHIPPED statuses).

parameters.name: externalSource
parameters.description: The marketplace source (e.g., etsy, amazon, ebay)

post.description: Validate order details and preview costs before creating. Use this endpoint to verify offer availability, calculate estimated costs, and check shipping feasibility before creating an external order.

Create a new customization based on a product template.

            **Authentication modes:**
            - OAuth with `offer_write` scope → creates shop-attached customization
            - API key → creates shop-attached customization
            - No authentication → creates unattached customization

            Unattached customizations can be claimed when the user signs up or logs in.

Register an uploaded image with the customization.

            After uploading a file using the URL from the upload link endpoint,
            call this endpoint to register the image with the customization.

            **Source tracking:** Use `sourceProvider` and `sourceDocumentId` to track
            which external design tool created this image.

            **Authentication modes:**
            - OAuth with `offer_write` scope → saves to shop's media library
            - API key → saves to shop's media library
            - No authentication + customizationId → saves to temporary storage

post.summary: Generate upload URL for media image
post.description:
Generate a signed URL for direct file upload to cloud storage.

            **Supported content types:**
            - image/png, image/jpeg, image/gif, image/svg+xml
            - image/webp, image/bmp, image/tiff, image/x-icon

            **Maximum file size:** 500MB

            **Authentication modes:**
            - OAuth with `offer_write` scope → upload to shop's media library
            - API key → upload to shop's media library
            - No authentication + customizationId → upload to temporary storage

get.description: Get webhook events with pagination and optional filtering by webhook type
Get a single webhook event by ID
Get Thank You details
Returns paginated list of orders, donations, and other contributions that can be thanked
Returns streaming status for all services
Returns the current shop
Returns the current shop contact info
Returns a promotion by id
Returns all products with pagination
Returns product by id
Returns product (offer) inventory by id

List available product templates. Returns 25 results. To paginate, use the /page/{N} variant of this endpoint (1-indexed). Use the total field in the response to calculate total pages. Pagination is path-based for HTTP cacheability.

Get detailed information about a specific product template.

            This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.
            Returns full product details including variants, customizable areas,
            size guide, and images.

Search product templates by name, brand, description, sizes, categories, colors, or production method. Returns 25 results. To paginate, use the /search/{query}/page/{N} variant of this endpoint (1-indexed). Use the total field in the response to calculate total pages. Pagination is path-based for HTTP cacheability.
Search product templates with pagination. This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.
List available product templates with pagination. This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

Browse product templates filtered by category. Category matches by prefix (e.g., 'Apparel' matches 'Apparel/T-Shirts'). Returns 25 results. To paginate, use the /category/{category}/page/{N} variant of this endpoint (1-indexed). Use the total field in the response to calculate total pages. Pagination is path-based for HTTP cacheability.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Category path. Top-level: Apparel, Accessories, Home & Living. Subcategory paths like 'Apparel/T-Shirts' are also valid.

get.summary: Browse product templates by category by page
get.description: Browse product templates by category with pagination. This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Category path. Top-level: Apparel, Accessories, Home & Living. Subcategory paths like 'Apparel/T-Shirts' are also valid.

get.description: Returns all orders with pagination
Returns order by id
Returns order by friendly id
Lists all tiers for the current shop
Lists all members for the current shop
Gets a member by id
Returns all mailing list entries
Returns all packages with giveaway links
Returns all giveaway links for packageId
Get draw details
Returns gift purchase details by id

get.summary: Get external order by external source and ID
get.description: Returns details of a specific external order using the marketplace's source and order ID. This is the preferred method for external marketplace integrations.

parameters.name: externalSource
parameters.description: The marketplace source (e.g., etsy, amazon, ebay)

get.summary: Get cancellation summary for external order
get.description: Returns whether the external order can be cancelled and a preview of affected fulfillments. Use this before calling the cancel endpoint to understand what will be affected.

parameters.name: externalSource
parameters.description: The marketplace source (e.g., etsy, amazon, ebay)

get.description: Returns all donations with pagination
Returns donation by id

Get the current image placements for all regions on a customization.
            Returns a simplified view of what's placed where, with image URIs,
            dimensions, and positioning parameters.
Returns all collections with pagination
Returns collection by slug
Returns all collections
Returns a collection
Returns all products in the collection

width.description: The original width of the image in pixels.

height.description: The original height of the image in pixels.

transformedUrl.description: Transformed URL with applied image processing (e.g., resizing, optimization)

creatorDeclaredCost.description: Product cost as declared by the creator. Null if not set.
